subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou art the One Who beholdeth my condition, Who hearkeneth unto my call, Who art the Physician for my malady and the Remedy for my healing. Unto Thee be all praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت البصیر بحالی و السمیع لندائی و الطبیب لدائی و الدواء لشفائی لک الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
